name: Atnaş Dimo
notes: Tax farmer (öşür mültezimi) and procurement intermediary for MacAndrews & Forbes in Umurlu and Nazilli? region

name: Varpati
notes: Commercial agent representing a rival European company in Söke; involved in 1878–79 dispute with MacAndrews & Forbes.

name: Arakçin
notes: Claimed French protection; nationality disputed in 1906–07 licorice seizure case; subject of extended nationality investigation.
